title: icacorea glauciflora
intro: Icacorea glauciflora, also known as the 'Glaucous Icacorea' or 'Purple Icacorea', is a plant species belonging to the family Icacinaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to lower blood pressure and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Icacorea glauciflora include its potential to help manage hypertension, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms associated with fever and pain. Icacorea glauciflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
